holdings.name: Persistent Systems
holdings.description: Mid-cap IT company growing 30%+ revenue annually. Focused on BFSI, healthcare and hitech verticals. AI engineering services hub; Salesforce and Microsoft partner. Strong US presence with large deal wins.

holdings.name: Coforge
holdings.description: Travel, BFSI and insurance vertical specialist IT firm. 60%+ offshore delivery, 30% revenue growth CAGR. BPS and HRO acquisitions adding depth. Strong order book visibility gives revenue predictability.

holdings.name: Voltas
holdings.description: India's #1 room AC brand with 23% market share. Tata Group branded consumer products business. Also runs EPC cooling systems for industrial/commercial buildings. Summer season super-cycle driving volume growth.

holdings.name: Balkrishna Industries
holdings.description: World's largest specialty off-highway tyre maker. Supplies to agriculture, mining and industrial segments globally. 75%+ export revenues in USD. European presence growing; low competition moat in niche tyre sizes.

holdings.name: Crompton Greaves Consumer
holdings.description: India's #2 fans maker and premium kitchen appliances brand. Acquired Butterfly brand for South India distribution. Energy-efficient BLDC fans driving ASP upgrade. Strong D2C and modern trade channel growth.

holdings.name: Mphasis
holdings.description: Blackstone-backed IT company specialising in BFSI and mortgage technology. Front2Back transformation (F2B) platform for US mortgage servicers. Direct channel growing faster than DXC legacy. Margin expansion underway.
